title: Authenticated IP Registration, Simulated Blockchain Badges, and Full IPGT Coin Removal

requirements.text: Gate the IP registration form in frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx behind Internet Identity login AND a completed profile setup step. If the user is not logged in, display a prompt to log in via Internet Identity. If the user is logged in but has not completed profile setup (display name, organisation, optional email), redirect or prompt them to complete the profile via ProfileSetupModal before they can access the registration form. Unauthenticated users may still browse the IP database at /database.

quotes: Once you are a user you should be able to add IP.

Internet Identity login remains the auth mechanism. After logging in, users will be directed through a brief profile setup step (display name, organisation, optional email) before they can access IP registration.

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /register-ip while unauthenticated shows a login prompt instead of the form.
Visiting /register-ip while authenticated but profile-incomplete triggers the ProfileSetupModal before showing the form.
Visiting /register-ip while authenticated and profile-complete shows the registration form immediately.
The IP database at /database remains publicly accessible without login.

requirements.text: Update the backend in backend/main.mo to support user profile storage with display name, organisation, and optional email fields. Ensure the profile setup step called from ProfileSetupModal (useSaveCallerUserProfile) persists these fields. The profile must be associated with the caller's principal. If the profile data structures already exist, verify they include an organisation field and add it if missing.

quotes: users will be directed through a brief profile setup step (display name, organisation, optional email) before they can access IP registration

acceptanceCriteria: The backend actor exposes a saveCallerUserProfile function accepting display name, organisation (text), and optional email.
The profile is stored stably and retrievable by the caller's principal.
Existing profile fields (display name, email) are preserved and organisation is added without breaking existing calls.

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModal.tsx to include an 'Organisation' text input field (optional) in the profile setup form, alongside the existing display name and optional email fields. Persist all three fields on submission. Style the new field consistently with the existing dark navy/gold theme.

quotes: profile setup step (display name, organisation, optional email)

acceptanceCriteria: The ProfileSetupModal form contains fields for display name (required), organisation (optional), and email (optional).
On submission, all three values are sent to the backend.
The modal cannot be dismissed without completing at least the display name field.
Styling matches the existing dark navy/gold theme.

requirements.text: After a successful IP registration on ICP canisters, update frontend/src/components/RegistrationSuccessModal.tsx to display a simulated 'Also Recorded On' section showing mock cross-chain references. This section must show: (a) a mock Ethereum transaction ID (e.g. '0x' followed by a hex string) and block number, and (b) a mock Solana transaction signature and slot number. Label this section clearly as 'Future Integration — Simulated Reference' or equivalent disclaimer text so users understand this is a planned feature and not a live cross-chain transaction.

quotes: the confirmation screen and IP record detail will display a simulated 'Also Recorded On' badge/reference showing a mock Solana or Ethereum transaction ID and block reference — presented clearly as a future integration layer

acceptanceCriteria: The RegistrationSuccessModal displays an 'Also Recorded On' section with mock Ethereum and Solana references.
Each reference shows a transaction ID/signature and a block/slot number.
A disclaimer label clearly indicates this is a simulated future integration layer.
All IPGT coin, burn fee, and token language is absent from the modal.
Styling matches the dark navy/gold theme.

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.tsx to display a simulated 'Also Recorded On' section for each IP record, showing mock Ethereum and Solana cross-chain references (transaction ID/signature, block/slot number) with a clear disclaimer that these are simulated future integration references. This section should appear below the existing blockchain metadata (ICP canister details, block height, timestamp).

quotes: IP record detail will display a simulated 'Also Recorded On' badge/reference showing a mock Solana or Ethereum transaction ID and block reference

acceptanceCriteria: IPDetailModal shows an 'Also Recorded On' section with mock ETH and Solana references.
The section is clearly labelled as a future/simulated integration.
ICP canister metadata and other existing fields remain intact.
Styling is consistent with the dark navy/gold theme.

requirements.text: Remove all IPGT Coin, burn fee, token balance, token transfer, and payment references from every frontend page, form, modal, component, and route. Specifically: (a) delete or disable the /coin-dashboard route in frontend/src/App.tsx; (b) remove TokenStats from any page that still renders it; (c) remove all burn fee and IPGT token mentions from frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx; (d) remove all token balance, transfer form, and coin-related UI from frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx or remove the page entirely; (e) remove any remaining IPGT coin/token balance display from frontend/src/components/Header.tsx; (f) ensure frontend/src/components/RegistrationSuccessModal.tsx contains no burn fee or IPGT token text; (g) remove any remaining coin/token references from frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx.

quotes: Remove all IPGT Coin / payment references — Every mention of IPGT coin, burn fees, token balances, and transfer forms will be removed from all pages, forms, modals, and the coin dashboard route.

acceptanceCriteria: No page, modal, form, or component in the app displays IPGT coin balance, burn fee, token transfer, or any coin/token language.
The /coin-dashboard route is removed or redirects away.
The Coin Dashboard page is either deleted or emptied of all token-related UI.
TokenStats component is not rendered on any page.
Header does not show a coin balance for authenticated users.
RegistrationSuccessModal shows no burn fee or token amount.
Footer contains no coin/token language.

constraints: Do not modify any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The IP database at /database must remain publicly accessible without authentication.
Simulated Solana/ETH references must be clearly labelled as future/simulated — never presented as live cross-chain transactions.
The dark navy/gold visual theme (Playfair Display headings, Inter body, gold accents) must be preserved across all modified components.
nonGoals: Live Solana or Ethereum smart contract integration — simulated references only.
Any payment, subscription, or token-gating mechanism to replace IPGT coins.
Changes to the Whitepaper page content or styling.
Changes to the IP database mock records or search/filter functionality.
